patterns_recognized: Negative-edge GOLD/PLATINUM picks reliably fail as EV-negative bets — HARD CAP 1 validated 6+ times including triple-F-signal fires (MIL@CHC 5/18: F1+F2+F3, still lost at -1.70pp edge). Market information dominates F-signal conviction at any magnitude.

D-grade picks with BOTH SP-edge-against AND PQI-against went 0-for-4 on 5/20, 0-for-2 on 5/18, 0-for-1 on 5/21: directionally expected wrong, not merely uncertain. Multiple SKIP games today (STL@CIN, PIT@TOR, MIN@BOS, NYM@MIA, SEA@KC, OAK@SD) carry this dual-signal-against profile.

HARD CAP 7 near-zero gap concern: first live firing (5/20 HOU@MIN, +0.0014) was direction-correct; today COL@ARI fires at +0.0048. Pending calibration whether threshold should rise to ≥0.010. Confirming B- (no parlay) rather than overriding upward.

Three-signal GOLD CONFIRM bar (F-signal + edge>4pp + f5_full_delta<0.15 + no stacked flags) remains validated 4-for-5 through 5/20. HOU@CHC today satisfies all conditions cleanly — the slate's sole stakeable pick.

HARD CAP 10 bottom-bucket rescue caution: even CONFIRM-rescued picks in (0.50, 0.55] band hit only 47.6%, below breakeven. CHW@SF lands in this bucket; combined with HARD CAP 7 firing and below-band edge, explicitly declining rescue via DOWNGRADE.

HOU @ CHC.reasoning: Slate's sole clean staking candidate. F3=938.3 fires for CHC's lineup quality against Arrighetti; edge=+7.18pp in [4,15]pp band; f5_full_delta=0.0158 (Stage 1/2 tightly agree); confidence_downgrade=False; fair_prob=0.5794. pick_prob=0.6512 is just at the heuristic-1 threshold of 65%, but positive edge + Stage 1/2 alignment satisfies the three-signal GOLD bar per 5/14 and 5/20 validation. pqi_diff=+0.645 confirms CHC direction. No stacked flags. Taillon (CHC home) vs Arrighetti (HOU away) at Wrigley with a confirmed lineup edge.
lessons_applied: Three-signal GOLD bar (F3>500 + edge>4pp + f5_full_delta<0.15 + no flags) validated 4-for-5 through 5/20 — all conditions met today
pqi_diff=+0.645 confirms CHC direction; aligned with the 5/14 PHI@BOS GOLD CONFIRM pattern
Heuristic-1 (>65% home favorite) at pick_prob=0.6512 is borderline; positive edge+Stage 1/2 agreement suffices per 5/12 WSH@CIN precedent

STL @ CIN.reasoning: D-grade (-4) with dual opposing signals: SP edge 1.92 xERA AGAINST STL pick (Paddack superior to Leahy) and PQI against STL (Δ=+25.5). Stage 1/2 disagree Δ=0.21 (CIN dominates F5 at 70.9%, STL needs bullpen carry at coin-flip full-game probability 50.35%). confidence_downgrade=True. Dual-signal-against D-grade pattern went 0-for-4 on 5/20 and 0-for-2 on 5/18 — treat STL direction as structurally suspect. SKIP correctly prevents any exposure.
lessons_applied: D-grade with SP-edge-against + PQI-against = expected wrong direction (0-for-6 combined on 5/18 and 5/20)
Stage 1/2 disagree Δ=0.21 + confidence_downgrade=True: bullpen-carry thesis unsupported (5/9 MIN@CLE pattern)

CLE @ PHI.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 fired (edge=-9.88pp < 0): market has CLE priced more favorably than model implies for PHI at 55.35%. HARD CAP 10 secondarily fires (pick_prob=0.5535 in (0.50, 0.55], decision=none). Both caps correctly prevent any stake. PHI's Sánchez holds a 2.62 xERA advantage (F1_xera_gap) but the market's negative edge reflects information about CLE's Gavin Williams that the model underweights. HARD CAP 1 is 6+ times validated — do not override regardless of SP edge.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 (negative-edge GOLD) validated 6+ times — market information dominates F1_xera_gap conviction
